eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Minnesota; at 5:28 AM on OCT 9, 2019 Effective until 6:28 AM. Message from MN HSEM.
extra_text: This is a weekly coordinated test of the broadcast stations in your area. If this had been an actual emergency, official messages would have followed the alert tone. This concludes a test of the Emergency Alert System. This is only a test.
